title: Battle of Nadiem
content:
{{Top|canon=Duel on Nadiem}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Terra Sool]][[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 2|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 2]] |conc= |next=[[Mission to Omphalos]] |image=[[File:BattleofNadiem.jpg]] |name=Battle of Nadiem |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]{{CWACite|2|Hide in Plain Sight}} |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|21.6 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' 5 months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] |place=[[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]] |result=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] victory |side1=*Galactic Republic *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |side2=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] *[[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] *[[General/Legends|General]] [[B'dard Tone]]{{InsiderCite|86|Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous}} *[[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] *Commander [[Zephata'ru'tor]] † *A [[Unidentified Ho'Din Jedi|Ho'Din]] [[Jedi healer/Legends|Jedi healer]]†[[Dark Times 7|''Dark Times'' 7]] |commanders2=[[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*At least 7 [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] *[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] *[[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commandos]] *[[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commandos]] *[[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]] walkers *[[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery|SPHA-T]] walkers *[[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|LAAT gunships]] |forces2=*[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] *[[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] *[[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]] *[[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|IG-227 ''Hailfire''-class droid tanks]] *[[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droids]] *Several Separatist fighter [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] **[[Fighter Wing Zero-Zero]] *1 [[Belbullab-22 starfighter/Legends|''Belbullab''-22 starfighter]] **[[Soulless One/Legends|''Soulless One'']] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Moderate **Many clone troopers **At least one AT-TE walker **Several LAAT gunships **Commander Zephata'ru'tor **The [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] Jedi healer |casual2=*Most of the Separatist forces |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=Most of the Nadiem's populace either displaced or killed *[[Crys Taanzer]]'s [[Crys Taanzer's husband|husband]] }} {{Quote|Worried about the battle, Master?''"
"''No, Barriss. I have every confidence in our army, but I wanted to get the civilians clear before the fighting began.|Barriss Offee and her master, Luminara Unduli, shortly before the Battle of Nadiem|}} The '''Battle of Nadiem''' occurred during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], five months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], invaded the Republic-controlled [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]] and was able to to grab a strong foothold on the planet. The Republic then sent a detachment of [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|their own clone army]] to counter the invasion, along with several [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] including [[Senior Jedi General|Senior General]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] and [[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]], resulting in a full scale battle, with Nadiem's civilian populace caught in the middle. During the fighting, [[Threadneedle Canyon]] became a point of contention between the two sides, with Grievous and the Confederacy controlling one side of the canyon, and the Republic controlling the small valley on the other. Meanwhile, General Tiin set up a strong Republic [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] around Nadiem, preventing any Confederate reinforcements to make it through. While General Unduli and her [[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice|apprentice]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] were strengthening the Republic's defenses and evacuating a small town in the valley, Grievous ordered a large amount of his forces to go through the canyon and destroy the Republic troops on the other side, while he stayed behind and commanded his troops from his [[command bunker]]. As the Separatist forces were moving through Threadneedle, Offee and several [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] got stranded in the center of the canyon after giving up their transportation to a group of refugees. Realizing that engaging the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] forces directly would only result in their [[Death/Legends|deaths]], Offee ordered her troops to fire at the advancing Separatist column from a distance, and after the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] returned fire, to lie motionless on the ground so that the enemy would believe they were dead and pass them by. Offee's plan worked, and once the droids moved on, her troops and herself climbed the canyon and prepared to ambush the Separatist forces from behind. The Confederate column soon engaged Unduli and her troops on the other side of the canyon, and were about to break through the Republic's defenses when Offee and her troops began to fire on the droids from behind. With their rear support failing, the droids tried to retreat when Offee's clonetoopers detonated several explosives they had put into place beforehand. The resulting explosion caused an avalanche, cutting off the Separatists' only route of retreat, and any remaining battledroids were systematically neutralized. With most of their forces destroyed, the Separatists were forced to abandon Nadiem. However, while Grievous was fleeing Nadiem in his personal [[Belbullab-22 starfighter/Legends|''Belbullab''-22 starfighter]], he was attacked by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[B'dard Tone]] and his apprentice [[Zephata'ru'tor]] above the planet. Grievous managed to kill Zephata'ru'tor and seriously injure Tone before escaping into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|My world was caught in the middle. We had little to offer either side. We were ''attacked'' mainly because the Republic chose to defend us.|Crys Taanzer, on Nadiem|}} [[File:Nadiem.jpg|thumb|left|225px|The small town at the Republic-controlled end of [[Threadneedle Canyon]].]] In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]—five months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] and the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]—the Confederacy [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]], under the command of the Separatist [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], invaded the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]] in the [[Baxel sector/Legends|Baxel sector]].{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} Even though Nadiem had little strategic value for either side, the Separatists attacked the planet. According to Nadiem native [[Crys Taanzer]], the main reason for the Confederate invasion was simply because the Republic had chosen to defend the world. In response to the invasion, the Republic reinforced Nadiem with [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|their clone army]], as well as dispatched several [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] to take command of the situation. Among the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] sent to Nadiem were [[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] and [[Senior Jedi General|Senior General]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]], as well as Unduli's [[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice|apprentice]]/[[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]], Grievous and his Confederate forces managed to grab a strong foothold on Nadiem before the Republic could respond, and landed a large amount of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and [[Tank/Legends|tanks]]. When the Jedi-led support arrived, General Unduli, Commander Offee, and several other Jedi landed on the planet and began to reinforce the Republic's defenses, while General Tinn set up a strong Republic [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] around Nadiem. During the invasion, the citizens' of Nadiem had been caught in the middle of the fighting, [[Death/Legends|killing]] many and displacing many more. As a result, the Jedi started an evacuation of the planet's residents, with General Unduli and her apprentice personally overseeing the evacuation themselves. During the invasion, [[Threadneedle Canyon]] became a point of contention between the two sides on the planet, with the Republic fortifying their defenses in a valley on one side of the canyon, while the Separatists' controlled the other. Grievous, from a [[command bunker]] deep inside Confederate territory, ordered the bulk of his [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and heavy tanks to move through the canyon and seize the valley on the other side, and ordered several [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] to break through the Republic blockade over the planet and provide air support. Meanwhile, the Jedi continued to evacuate Nadiem's populace, with Unduli and Offee focusing her attention on evacuating a small town in the valley. ==The battle== ===Evacuation=== {{Quote|How goes the evacuation, Lieutenant?''"
"''Slowly, General. Most of the civilians want to bring possessions with them, but we have limited space...|A clone [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] to Luminara Unduli on how slow the evacuation of Nadiem is going|}} [[File:Swdt7p3.jpg|thumb|left|225px|The evacuation of Nadiem.]] While General Unduli and Commander Offee were organizing the evacuation of the planet, an [[Unidentified squad (Nadiem)|advance squad]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] stationed in Threadneedle Canyon that were monitoring the advancing Separatist column from afar reported to Unduli that the battle droids were quickening their pace and would arrive in the valley within an hour. As the Separatist column moved closer to the Republic's position, Unduli allowed any civilian who wanted to abandon their homes a chance to board a Republic [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]] and to be transported to a safer location, hoping to get the noncombatants clear before the Confederacy began their assault on the village. However, space and time was limited, so Unduli told the refugees that they were prohibited from taking any personal possessions with them. While most did comply with these order, at least [[Fat Man|one man]] tried to smuggle a great amount of wealth in his shirt onto a [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]]. Unduli managed to spot the man, and stopped him from boarding an evacuation ship. Even with this rule, however, there were still too many refugees to move with so few gunships, and several had to wait in long lines for a chance to board a ship. In some cases, there were even mad scrambles to board gunships that were lifting off. Elsewhere on the planet, Crys Taanzer and her son [[Kennan Taanzer|Kennan]], both residents of Nadiem turned refugees by the invasion, managed to get to a different Republic evacuation site, but were not able to board any ships due to the long lines. During the Separatist invasion, Cry's [[Cry Taanzer's husband|husband]] had been killed, her home destroyed, and her son's arm injured. Meanwhile, a large amount of Separatist droids were attacking the Republic's outer defense lines at the evacuation site, trying to stop the Republic outpost. The droids were also firing at the landing LAAT gunships, shooting down a number of them. As the Taanzers were waiting at the boarding site, a [[Unidentified Ho'Din Jedi|Ho'Din Jedi healer]] who was assisting the refugees noticed that Kennan was not crying, even though his arm was badly hurt. With Cry's permission, the [[Jedi healer/Legends|Jedi healer]] had his [[Unidentified Human Padawan|Human padawan]] quickly test Kennan's [[Blood/Legends|blood]], confirming what the Jedi had originally suspected, that Kennan was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]]. With this information, the healer offered Crys a chance to let Kennan escape Nadiem, saying that her son could join the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and would be given safe transport to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi's temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] within two days. Realizing that Kennan and herself would likely both die on Nadiem if she did not take the offer, Crys agreed to the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din's]] request and gave her son over to the Jedi. As Kennan was rushed to an awaiting gunship, the nearby Separatist forces finally overwhelmed the Republic's lines, and began to assault the evacuation site. The Ho'Din Jedi tried to rally the last remaining clone troopers and push back the Separatists, but he too was eventually killed by the numerous battle droids. With the area compromised, Crys Taanzer and the last surviving civilians fled the site to find shelter elsewhere. [[File:Threadneedle_Canyon.jpg|thumb|right|225px|The Separatist droid army moving through Threadneedle Canyon.]] Back at Threadneedle canyon, the advance squad came across a group of civilians from an outlying settlement in the canyon that been trying to reach Unduli's evacuation point. An elder refugee in the group was very ill, and had delayed the others' progress to the valley. The clone squad's [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] [[Unidentified ARC commander (Nadiem)|commander]] contacted General Unduli and informed her of their situation and requested for a gunship to pick the squad and the refugees up. When Offee heard about this, she asked her master to let her go along with the gunship, believing she could help load the refugees in faster. Unduli permitted Offee to go, but only if she took a squad of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] along with her for protection. As Offee's gunship left to airlift the stranded refugees and clones, the Confederate column reached a point in the canyon which they had designated as sector five, with the a droid reporting back to Grievous about their progress via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]]. Grievous, from his bunker, told his column that the Republic would likely ambush them later on, at the narrowest part of the canyon, designated as sector seven. The cyborg general told the column to move their heaviest tanks to the front, ordering them to smash through the ambush when it happened. Meanwhile, above Nadiem, General Tiin's [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] was engaged by Separatist [[Fighter Wing Zero-Zero]] as the Confederate vessels tried to break through the Republic blockade. The Republic fleet was too strong for the droid [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] though, and the Separatists were forced to turn back. Grievous was angered upon hearing this news, knowing that he would not have air support for the upcoming battle. ===Playing dead=== {{Quote|We've lost contact with Commander Offee and the advance squad, General.|A clone lieutenant to General Unduli|}} In the canyon, Commander Offee and her gunship arrived to pick up the marooned clones and civilians. However, Offee discovered that there were more refugees than she had anticipated and there was not enough room for both her troopers and the refugees aboard the gunship. The civilians were loaded into the ship, and, realizing that she could not abandon her own soldiers, Offee decided to stay with them. Offee planned that she and her troops would try to hold off the Separatist droids from the canyon as long as possible, so to buy more time for Unduli to evacuate the civilians in the valley. When General Unduli was informed about General Tiin's success over the planet, she contacted her apprentice about the development over their [[Comlink/Legends|comlinks]]. Glad to hear the news, Offee told her master about her being stranded in the canyon and about her plan to hold back the Separatists. She also asked that Unduli not send another gunship to pick Offee's squad up, believing the Separatist column would be upon them before it would arrive. Unduli was heavily disappointed by this news, knowing that Offee would almost certainly die fighting the Confederacy army, but knew that her apprentice was correct in her assertion. [[File:Playingdead.jpg|thumb|left|225px|Offee and her troops pretending to be dead as the droid army passes them by.]] As Offee closed her comlink the advance squad's ARC trooper told the Jedi Padawan that his squad had been planning an ambush for the Separatist column already. The squad had set up explosives at the narrowest part of the canyon, and had been going to detonate them as the enemy column approached, hoping to delay the droids' advance and make a stand. Commander Offee knew that the plan would only slow the Separatists for a short time, and would result in their own deaths. However, she had a different plan, one that would possibly preserve their lives. As the Separatist column approached sector seven, Grievous ordered his droids to be prepared for the predicted Republic ambush. Commander Offee's troops began to fire on the droid forces from farther afar, destroying a few [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]]. The Confederate battle droids and their [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tanks]] began to fire back blindly, and after a short pause where the clone troopers did not return fire, continued marching forward. Meanwhile, the Republic forces back in the valley lost contact with Offee's men, with Unduli fearing that her apprentice had been killed. As the droid column moved through sector seven, they passed Offee and her clone troopers, lying motionless on the ground. Believing the Jedi and clones to be dead, the droids moved past and continued on towards the valley. However, Offee and her troops were not dead, but just pretending to be so. Offee had realized that she and her troops would be killed if they engaged the Confederate army directly, and instead fooled the droids into thinking they were dead. Once all the droid had passed the squad, Offee ordered her men to get up and grab the explosives they had originally planned for the ambush. ===The trap=== {{Quote|Barriss! You're alive! But how? I was sure you and your troops were dead...''"
"''So were the droids. And that's what saved us.|Luminara Unduli and Barriss Offee after the Republic's victory at Nadiem|}} [[File:AvalanchEIP.jpg|thumb|right|225px|The Separatist army caught in the avalanche.]] By the time the Separatist army arrived at the Republic controlled town, Offee and her troops had climbed to the top of the canyon's right wall, and had positioned themselves towards the back of the Confederate column. Meanwhile, the droid forces emerged from the mouth of Threadneedle Canyon and engaged Unduli's forces. The Republic were well dug in and prepared for the Confederacy, using their [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery]] tanks to cut into the droids' flanks. However, the Separatist's own [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|Hailfire droid tanks]] fired back with deadly accuracy, destroying at least one Republic [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TE]] tank and killing several clones. The droid forces began to overwhelm the Republic's position with their superior numbers, and it seemed that the Separatists would win the battle. However, as one of the battle droids was reporting the column's progress back to Grievous, Offee's squad began to fire down on the Separatist's tanks from behind. The droids were confused by this, having thought they had left no one alive back in the canyon, and were not able to fire back at Offee's men, too preoccupied with fighting the main Republic forces in front of them. Commander Offee's squad destroyed the column's rear Hailfire tanks and [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|dwarf spider droids]] one by one, thinning the Separatists' ranks. Meanwhile, Unduli's troops continued to fire on the Separatists' frontward rows, mowing down the column from both sides. With their front and rear guards gone, the droids' progress was stopped, forcing them into a frantic retreat. With the Confederate army now in disarray, Unduli and her clone troopers launched a charge against the withdrawing droids. The Confederate retreat played right into Offee's plan, who had her squad place their explosives at the top of the canyon, farther behind the Separatists column. As the droids passed under where the explosives were planted, Offee's troops detonated them, loosening the rocks in the canyon wall and causing an avalanche that crushed many of the battle droids, leaving the remaining Separatists trapped between a wall of rubble and the charging Republic clones. Back in his bunker, Grievous watched his hologram of the battle, seeing as his army was trapped and destroyed. The cyborg general smashed his hologram projector in anger, knowing that the Separatists had lost Nadiem. Unduli and her soldiers destroyed the remaining battle droids when Commander Offee and her squad emerged from the smoke and dust created by the avalanche. Unduli was glad and surprised to see her apprentice alive, asking Offee how she had survived. Offee told her master about her plan, joking that she and her troops had hid in plain sight from the Separatists as they passed by. ===Separatist withdrawal=== {{Quote|You have seen the General in action?''"
"''At Nadiem, he killed my Padawan and left me as you see me now.|Jedi apprentice [[Flynn Kybo]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] B'dard Tone about General Grievous's escape from Nadiem|''[[Star Wars: General Grievous]]''}} [[File:BdardTone-GeneralGrievous1.jpg|thumb|left|150px|B'dard Tone after his confrontation with Grievous at Nadiem.]] With the majority of their army destroyed, the Confederacy was forced to abandon Nadiem and leave it to the Republic. Grievous chose to leave Nadiem in his personal [[Belbullab-22 starfighter/Legends|''Belbullab''-22 starfighter]], the [[Soulless One/Legends|''Soulless One'']], trying to clear the Republic blockade on the far side of the planet. However, as he entered [[Realspace/Legends|space]], Grievous was attacked by Jedi Master [[B'dard Tone]] and his apprentice [[Zephata'ru'tor]]—a [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]] who was able to survive in the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of space—attempting to prevent the cyborg's escape. After a short [[Space warfare/Legends|space battle]] above the planet, Grievous was able to dispatch Tone, seriously injuring the Jedi Master. Shortly afterwards, Grievous killed Zephata'ru'tor, and jumped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], fleeing Nadiem. ==Aftermath== B'dard Tone was later rescued by the Republic, and was forced to undergo several [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] replacements due to the injuries he had sustained at the hands of Grievous over Nadiem. This included a metal plating covering the left side of his face, as wells as a robotic right arm. For the death of his Padawan at Nadiem, as well as the injuries he received, Tone held a personal vendetta against Grievous, desiring the Jedi Order to track and kill the cyborg. This feeling of revenge would lead Tone, his new apprentice [[Codi Ty]], and fellow Jedi [[Flynn Kybo]] to desert the Order to personally hunt down the Separatist general[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. Tone and his companions [[Battle of Belsus|tracked]] Grievous to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Belsus/Legends|Belsus]], where Grievous killed Tone and Kybo in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]].[[General Grievous 4|''General Grievous'' 4]] Following the end of the battle, Nadiem was freed from the Confederate invasion, but a majority of the planet's infrastructure and housing was left in ruin. Despite the fact that most of Nadiem's surviving civilians were now left homeless, the planet was abandoned by the Republic and the Jedi, unable to assist Nadiem's populace, being to busy fighting the Clone Wars across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Crys Taanzer, who was able to survive the fighting, grew a large amount of animosity towards the Republic and the Confederacy, blaming both fractions equally for the destruction that raged across Nadiem. Kennan was safely evacuated from the planet and brought into the Jedi Order, becoming a member of the [[Soaring Hawkbat Clan|Soaring Hawkbat youngling clan]] during his early training in the Force. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Kennan and the Soaring Hawkbat Clan were staying at a [[Bogden Jedi chapter house|Jedi chapter house]] on the planet [[Bogden 3]], awaiting transportation to Coruscant, when [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]—a Republic [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|contingency order]] that made the entire Jedi Order an enemy of the state—was declared. With Order 66 initiated, the clone troopers stationed at the training facility were ordered to kill all of the Jedi there, including the [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]]. Although many of the clan's members were killed in the resulting [[Massacre on Bogden 3|skirmish]], Kennan and the remaining younglings were rescued by Jedi Master [[K'Kruhk]] and Padawan [[Chase Piru]], who escaped the carnage on Bogden 3 and safely transported Kennan and the other surviving younglings to a [[Unidentified jungle moon (K'Kruhk)|moon]]. When Crys—who by now had left Nadiem and was working as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Uhumele]]''—heard about the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|destruction]] of the Jedi, and not knowing that Kennan had survived, assumed that her son had been killed. This news devastated her and caused her to regret the decision to give Kennan over to the Jedi on Nadiem. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Hide in Plain Sight|book=Free Comic Book Day|bformatted=Free Comic Book Day 2004 Special|reprint=1}} {{1st}} *[[General Grievous 1|''General Grievous'' 1]] {{Mo}} *[[Dark Times 7|''Dark Times'' 7]] {{Flash}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' {{Imo}} *{{InsiderCite|86|Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous}} *{{CSWECite|multiple}} {{1stID|Battle of Nadiem}} *{{StarshipsVehiclesCite|30|Droids, Aliens & Creatures}} {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]'' {{Imo}} *{{FactFile2014|54|UND 1-4|Luminara Unduli}} {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Nadiem |es=Batalla de Nadiem |nl=Battle of Nadiem |pl=Bitwa o Nadiem }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nadiem, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles in the Baxel sector]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]]
